_comment: Example group org chart (조직도) for the 파트별 업무 현황 dashboard. Copy this to {stateDir}/org.json (default ~/.deneb/org.json) and replace the FAKE names below with the real chart. This .example.json ships with fake data ONLY — never commit real person/company names. Nodes are a flat list joined by parentId; a node with a non-empty 'lane' becomes a dashboard part (its name = column title; its members/keywords/companies seed that part's classification rules). type is one of group|company|division|team. Affiliation (계열사/실/팀) is the tree itself — a person belongs to the node they sit under, and 겸직 is the same person listed under several nodes — so a member has no affiliation field. Each member carries only an optional 직급 (rank: 회장·사장·부사장·전무·상무·이사·부장·차장·과장·대리·주임·사원) and 직책 (position: 회장·대표·본부장·실장·팀장·팀원); both optional. Only a member's name affects classification; rank/position are display/sort/filter only. A node's leader (부서장) is the member whose position is 본부장/실장/팀장 — there is no separate 'head' field.
